description: Composition Pale blue and white printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, has a round neck, 4 button placket with covered buttons, embroidery and sequin embellishment each side of placket, short sleeves, long vents at sides and contrast print at hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which – along with the short sleeves, will keep you cool in warm weather. The embellishment on the front lift this kurta from plain to pretty – wear it over leggings or over jeans and add silver jewellery to match the sequins. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
